title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, The Man Company in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Man Company:
The Man Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company!
